mapper.select: SELECT user_id as userId, user_account as userAccount, vip_grade_code as vipGradeCode, status as status, valid_exe as validExe, valid_sum_exe as validSumExe, last_vip_time as lastVipTime FROM user_vip_flow_record WHERE created_time >= ( SELECT created_time FROM user_vip_flow_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND `status` != '' ORDER BY created_time DESC LIMIT 1 ) and user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_time DESC LIMIT 1
